creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Michelin Guide-approved meal for only 135 AED! 🥰

Save this for your next lunch date:
📍Josette, ICD Brookfield Place, DIFC
💗 Pink and fancy Parisian interiors
🇫🇷 Fine French cuisine
🍽️ Great Business Lunch menu available only on weekdays. Advance reservation recommended. 
💰 AED 135: 1 starter and 1 main course

Our chosen entrees are Aubergine Mille-Feuille and Carpaccio de Saumon Fume. Then, for main course, we ordered Cordon Bleu and Entrecote with Cafe de Paris sauce. 

Who will you bring here? Tag them in the comments. 

#MichelinGuideDubai #michelinrestaurant #josettedubai #dubairestaurants #dubaieats #dubaiblogger #uaeblogger #dubai #ladyandhersweetescapes

transcription.text: Can I call you Rosie? Cause you're sweet like a flower in bloom Can I call you Rosie?
